results.rendered_html: anubhuj 7 A. To enjoy, experience (good or bad things), suffer (as the due consequences of one's deeds); meghamuktaviśadāṃ sa caṃdrikāṃ anvabhuṃkta  R. 19. 39 ; sā maṃḍanānmaṃḍanamanvabhuṃkta  Ku. 7. 5.
